title: ProExam Simulator - Frontend Conversation History (Compacted)

phases.summary: Established project vision (ProExam Simulator - medical license exams). Created RULES.md (Angular 19 zoneless, signals, standalone, @control flow), Angular_PROJECT_MAP.md (folder structure), plan.md (execution phases), and frontend_design_plan.md (UX blueprint). Decisions: Tailwind CSS, custom components, JWT auth, i18n Arabic/English, signal-based state.

Built AuthLayoutComponent, InputFieldComponent, ButtonComponent, FormErrorsComponent with Tailwind theming, accessibility (unique IDs via randomUUID), and `@layer components` SCSS abstraction. Fixed: `[class]` clobbering bug → used `[class.name]="cond"` syntax. Committed shared library.

Built Login, Register, Forgot Password pages with split-screen AuthLayout. Integrated AuthService, interceptors (auth, error, loading), JWT localStorage persistence. Fixed CORS (backend Program.cs), fixed input-field disabled signal error, abstracted Tailwind to SCSS layers. Updated RULES.md/llms-full.txt with UI best practices. Added role-based routing guards.

Implemented exam lifecycle: POST /start → GET /attempt/{id} → PUT answer/flag → POST submit. Dynamic MCQ rendering (options array, radio buttons vs textarea for Essay). Timer component, Question Navigator (numbered grid), modals for Submit/Abandon. Fixed: timer doubling bug, abandon binding, 404 on report route. Decoupled view from data — no hardcoding.

DashboardLayout (sidebar + topbar), DashboardCardComponent for stats, Recent Activity table, Upcoming Exams widget. Skeleton loaders, empty state CTA. Integrated ExamService/DashboardService. Fixed critical auth redirect loop: authGuard not detecting token after login → added syncFromStorage() + restoreUserFromToken() in AuthService, fixed RoleGuard signal state self-healing, TSConfig rootDir warning resolved.

ExamResultComponent with score binding, totalTimeSeconds formatting, report generation spinner, navigation. ExamReportComponent with paginated questions, filter tabs (All/Incorrect/Flagged), Question Navigator sidebar (color-coded), topic performance bars, explanation boxes, option highlighting (green correct / red incorrect). Fixed: scorePercent field name, time tracking, options duplication.

Admin API wiring (PATCH toggle endpoints, paginated responses). Test Banks/Topics/Questions CRUD with FormArray for dynamic options. Rich text editor integration. Fixed: JWT claim mapping (Microsoft XMLSOAP URIs for sub/role/email/givenname), inactive record visibility (grayed rows + opacity-60), text overflow (word-break break-all + min-width:0), paginated response iteration error (response.items).

Database seeder for development: default candidate account (kgharaybehdev@gmail.com), 2-3 test banks with 5-10 questions each, multiple choice/true-false types, exam definitions with durations/pass marks. Environment-guarded (IsDevelopment()).

key_technical_decisions: Tailwind CSS custom components (no Material UI except complex tables)
JWT with refresh tokens, localStorage persistence
Split-screen auth layout, sidebar dashboard layout
Strict: NO inline templates, NO *ngIf/*ngFor, NO [class] clobbering
Accessibility: unique IDs via crypto.randomUUID(), WCAG AA
critical_bugs_fixed: Auth redirect loop after login (signal timing vs router guard)
JWT claim mapping for Microsoft WS-Federation XMLSOAP URIs
Text overflow in flex layouts (min-width:0 + word-break: break-all)
Paginated API response iteration (response.items vs response.data)
ScorePercent vs scorePercentage field name mismatch
